ns0:entry.ns0:title: Daymychen/art-design-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Daymychen/art-design-pro
Language: vue
A Vue 3 admin dashboard template using Vite + TypeScript + Element Plus | vue3 admin | vue-admin — focused on user experience and visual design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lissy93/dashy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lissy93/dashy
Language: vue
🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asadahimeka/pixiv-viewer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asadahimeka/pixiv-viewer
Language: vue
Yet Another Pixiv Illust&Novel Viewer. 又一个 Pixiv 阅览工具，提供 pixiv 的插画、动图、漫画和小说等作品的在线浏览，适配多端样式，提供多种浏览布局选择，支持 PWA 安装，支持自定义 API 与图床，支持 RefreshToken/OAuth/Cookie 方式登录。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: frappe/lms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/frappe/lms
Language: vue
Easy to Use, 100% Open Source Learning Management System

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ikuaitu/vue-fabric-editor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ikuaitu/vue-fabric-editor
Language: vue
快图设计-基于fabric.js和Vue的开源图片编辑器，可自定义字体、素材、设计模板。fabric.js and Vue based image editor, can customize fonts, materials, design templates.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: miantiao-me/Sink
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/miantiao-me/Sink
Language: vue
⚡ A Simple / Speedy / Secure Link Shortener with Analytics, 100% run on Cloudflare.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pipipi-pikachu/PPTist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pipipi-pikachu/PPTist
Language: vue
PowerPoint-ist（/'pauəpɔintist/）, An online presentation application that replicates most of the commonly used features of MS PowerPoint, allowing for the editing and presentation of PPT online. Support AIPPT.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ponysb/91Writing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ponysb/91Writing
Language: vue
一个基于 Vue 3 + Element Plus 的智能Ai小说创作工具，集成多种 AI 模型，助力作者高效创作

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qier222/YesPlayMusic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qier222/YesPlayMusic
Language: vue
高颜值的第三方网易云播放器，支持 Windows / macOS / Linux

ns0:entry.ns0:title: timeshiftsauce/CeruMusic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/timeshiftsauce/CeruMusic
Language: vue
Ceru Music 是基于 Electron 和 Vue 开发的跨平台桌面音乐播放器工具，借鉴洛雪音乐插件思想，提供插件运行框架与播放功能，不直接存储、提供任何音乐源文件。用户需通过自行选择、安装合规插件获取音乐相关数据，项目旨在为开发者提供桌面应用技术实践与学习案例，为用户提供合规的音乐播放工具框架。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
Language: vue
A modern vue admin panel built with Vue3, Shadcn UI, Vite, TypeScript, and Monorepo. It's fast!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yuhonas/free-exercise-db
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yuhonas/free-exercise-db
Language: vue
Open Public Domain Exercise Dataset in JSON format, over 800 exercises with a browsable public searchable frontend

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zwave-js/zwave-js-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zwave-js/zwave-js-ui
Language: vue
Full featured Z-Wave Control Panel UI and MQTT gateway. Built using Nodejs, and Vue/Vuetify
